response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00 - 02:44: Identified performance of 'Rettou Joutou' by Giga (performer Amane Kanata). 
2. 02:44 - End: Identified performance of 'Bokura no 16bit Sensou' by sasakure.UK (performer Amane Kanata). 
3. Performed searches for lyrics of both songs using original artists.
4. Compiled the results into the final JSON structure, ensuring escaping of quotes and line breaks.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTuber Amane Kanata, consisting of two songs: 'Rettou Joutou' originally by Giga and 'Bokura no 16bit Sensou' originally by sasakure.UK.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Grow up! Nah mean?)
(Track Giga)
(Rin Len rock da house, Let's go!)
(hey hey hey hey)
(Rettou Joutou Bring it on)
(hey hey hey hey)
(Rettou Joujou Fumin Nihon)
Children's tricks of mathematics
Putting on a show of noble warnings
It's boring just watching from the sidelines
Come on, making mistakes is better
Put your hands on the boredom
I can't end in a place like this
It's tepid, I feel like I'm going crazy
Goodbye to playing games and acting
Da-da-da, I'll become an adult
Savoring the bitter and the sweet, now
Pa-pa-pa, the changing times
It can't be all bad, can it?
The past, the sins, the punishments, everything
With my bare hands, with love, I'll survive and fight back
yeah, provocation, we are no doubt
You're only concerned with that green guy, huh?
Come on, burn up, when will I get a passing grade?
Use a red pen, where is it bad?
Alcohol, women, money, drugs
Chilling, aiight...
It's a joke, a black joke
Things that make you want to put up your middle finger
There are so many, I don't have enough fingers, so hands up
and what's up, the worst?
It's been that way from the start, Bring it on
I don't need a "so-so"
I'll want it until I die
Blow a kiss to the city where I grew up, with my grown height
The highlight is from here on, be prepared
Da-da-da, we'll become adults
Aiming for a counter-attack
In the worst days, a single blow struck firmly
The future that no one can read is still a tie, isn't it?
With bare hands, live! Survive and overturn it
(Rin n' Len in da space show)
I can't give up on the trivial things
Do you understand? My aesthetic
This one honest fist of mine
(I'm single-minded) Trumps
(I'm simple-minded) Inferiority that roars
I'm leaving first, goodbye!
Da-da-da, I'll become an adult
Savoring the bitter and the sweet, now
A brilliant future that intersects
You know I'm not a child anymore, right?
Time, opportunity, it won't wait for you
With bare hands, with all my might
Survive it, it's fine by me

scenes.description: The performer sings 'Bokura no 16bit Sensou'. The performance continues with high energy and dynamic stage effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どうしてこんな事になったんだ?
誰も教えちゃくれないんだ。
何がセイギだ 何がギセイだ
“秩序”は僕を裏切った

はじめは微さな孔だったんだ
居心地だけは良かったのにな。
プロパガンダと呑めや詠えや、
孔はしだいに誇大化した

65535 の テトラと
ゼロ次元 の 理想 抱えていても
なおひとつ またひとつと
エデンは姿を消した

ぼくらの16bit戦争。
イデアの波に蝕まれるな
残された空間で僕は
うかつに肘さえつけやしない

ぼくらの16bit戦争。
アルトとエゴが交差する
XYしか愛せない僕は
Z(なに)を信じて生きれば善い?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Why did things turn out like this?
Nobody will teach me.
What is justice? What is sacrifice?
"Order" has betrayed me.

At first, it was a tiny hole.
It was cozy, though.
Propaganda, drinking and singing,
The hole gradually grew extravagant.

65535 tetras and
Zero-dimensional ideals, even while holding them,
One by one, another one,
Eden disappeared.

Our 16-bit war.
Don't be eroded by the waves of ideas.
In the space that remains, I
Can't even lean on my elbow carelessly.

Our 16-bit war.
Alto and ego intersect.
I who can only love XY
What should I believe in and live for (Z)?
